meta.title: NomeSito — Free digital tools
meta.description: An open source association building accessible digital tools for everyone.

hero.title: Open technology for everyone
hero.subtitle: NomeSito is a volunteer association that builds and maintains free digital tools. All code is public, all documentation is free.

features.title: Why NomeSito
features.subtitle: We are not a startup. We are people who believe in free software and dedicate their free time to it.

openSource.title: Fully open source
openSource.description: Every line of code is public on GitHub. You can inspect, fork and contribute to any project.

docs.title: Curated documentation
docs.description: We write documentation as if it were part of the product, because it is. Clear, up-to-date and in plain language.

community.title: Inclusive community
community.description: A place where beginners find help and experienced people find others to exchange ideas with.

updates.title: Regular updates
updates.description: We publish release notes, technical articles and project updates on a regular basis.

projects.title: Featured projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of what we are working on.

news.title: Latest news
news.subtitle: Updates from the project and the community.

cta.title: Join the project
cta.subtitle: Every contribution is welcome: a pull request, a bug report, a translation or a donation all make a difference.
